parameters.name: prefix
parameters.description: Prefix of the API key to delete. Passed in the URL path. This is the first 8 characters of the API key you want to delete. Passed in the URL path. This is the first 8 characters of your API key, visible in the dashboard. You can also obtain this value via the GET method (see the `prefix` field in its response).

prefix.description: Prefix of the deleted API key.

deleted.description: Indicates whether the key was successfully deleted.
